rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (7/10) and converge on the same substantive assessment: strong technical background, developer-tools experience, and a lack of people-management experience. The wording differs ('leading organizational change' vs 'strategic roadmap planning', 'work on complex projects' vs 'delivering complex projects'), but these are reworded near-equivalents within ordinary run-to-run variation. No concern, score change, or shift in reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Sarah Smith.
